Recommendations.Description: Strategy 'AllSpend' has no counter — beats 4 strategies, loses to none.
Evidence: Beats: MixedRush, MixedTurtle, PawnGather, PawnIdle
No strategy achieves >60% win rate against this agent.
Recommendations.Rationale: Every strategy should have at least one viable counter for healthy metagame diversity.

Recommendations.Description: MONK may be over-performing: 100% win rate when produced (mean=73%).
Evidence: Cost=90g, HP/gold=4.4, DPS/gold=0.00
Produced 1 times, in 1/1 winning matches
Recommendations.Rationale: Increasing MONK cost by 15% would reduce its cost efficiency without changing combat feel.

Recommendations.Description: Rush strategies dominate: 94% of games end before frame 500.
Evidence: Median duration: 216 frames
Most games are decided before eco strategies can develop.
Recommendations.Rationale: Consider increasing early military costs or building times to extend the opening window.
